mapper.select: select count(distinct c.id) from lkt_auction_special a,lkt_auction_session b,lkt_auction_product c,lkt_product_list d,lkt_configure e,lkt_mch mch
select count(a.id) from lkt_auction_product as a left join lkt_auction_promise as b on a.id = b.a_id and b.store_id = a.store_id and b.user_id = #{user_id} left join lkt_mch as c on a.mch_id = c.id

SELECT a.id acId,a.price,c.product_title,d.img,special.`name` specialName,b.name sessionName,b.status sessionStatus,b.start_date,b.end_date, (select count(1) from lkt_auction_record x where x.auction_id=a.id) outNum,1 type FROM lkt_auction_product a LEFT JOIN lkt_auction_session b ON a.session_id = b.id left join lkt_auction_special special on special.id = b.special_id inner join lkt_product_list c on c.id = a.goods_id inner join lkt_configure d on d.id = a.attr_id where b.recovery = 0 and special.recovery=0
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

SELECT count(1) num FROM lkt_auction_product a LEFT JOIN lkt_auction_session b ON a.session_id = b.id left join lkt_auction_special special on special.id = b.special_id inner join lkt_product_list c on c.id = a.goods_id inner join lkt_configure d on d.id = a.attr_id where b.recovery = 0 and special.recovery=0

SELECT count(1) num FROM lkt_auction_product AS a INNER JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.attr_id = c.id inner join lkt_auction_session b on b.id=a.session_id and b.recovery=a.recovery inner join lkt_auction_special s on s.id=b.special_id and s.recovery=a.recovery inner join lkt_product_list goods on goods.id = c.pid left join lkt_product_class cls on cls.cid= substring_index(substring_index(goods.product_class, '-', 2), '-', -1) left join lkt_mch mch on mch.id=goods.mch_id

SELECT c.img FROM lkt_auction_product AS a INNER JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.attr_id = c.id INNER JOIN lkt_auction_session b ON b.id = a.session_id AND b.recovery = a.recovery INNER JOIN lkt_auction_special s ON s.id = b.special_id AND s.recovery = a.recovery INNER JOIN lkt_product_list goods ON goods.id = c.pid where s.id = #{specialId}

SELECT COUNT( 1 ) FROM lkt_auction_product AS a INNER JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.attr_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list goods ON goods.id = c.pid LEFT JOIN lkt_user_collection d ON d.p_id = a.id AND d.type = 3 WHERE goods.mch_id = #{mchId} and a.recovery=0 and a.is_show=1
